name: Smothered Steak Strips
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs chuck roast, cut into 1-inch strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Place steak strips, flour, salt, and pepper in a slow cooker.
2. Stir well to coat the steak evenly.
3. Slice onions and peppers very thin.
4. Add the sliced onions, green peppers, ketchup, barbecue sauce, water, mushrooms, molasses, brown sugar, and soy sauce to the slow cooker.
5. Cover and cook on high for 1 hour or low for 8 hours.
6. Serve over rice, noodles, potatoes, or with crusty bread. Also makes a good sandwich filling.
